meaning: adj.不肥沃的,贫瘠的,不毛的,不结果实的
examples: According to one survey, one woman in eight is infertile.
Cycads removed from their native habitats—and therefore from insects native to those habitats—are usually infertile.
The land was barren and infertile.
Procardia , a popular calcium channel-blocker sold generically as nifedipine , may render men infertile.
With so many infertile people desperate to have children, money is not the problem.
